title: Broccoli, Anchovy & Chickpea Orecchiette
summary: A quick and easy pasta with all the best things: anchovies, garlic, lemon and chilli. We’ve swapped half the pasta for chickpeas to up the protein and keep you feeling fuller longer.

method.description: Break the broccoli into florets and roughly chop the stems. Steam or boil them for about 5 mins until soft then drain, reserving a splash of the cooking liquid.
Meanwhile, finely chop the shallot, garlic, red chilli and fresh parsley and set aside.

Heat a glug of olive oil in a large pan over a medium heat. Add the shallots and cook for 5 mins until softened then add the anchovies and break them down with the back of a spoon. Next add in the chilli and garlic and cook for a further minute.
Add the cooked broccoli to the pan with a little of its cooking liquid and break it down with a spoon until it becomes saucy.
Cook your pasta of choice following pack instructions then drain and reserve a cup of the cooking water.
Add the pasta, a splash of its cooking liquid and the chickpeas to the pan and give everything a good mix. Cook for a further minute until the pasta is coated in the sauce.
Sprinkle in the fresh parsley and squeeze over the lemon juice. Taste and add seasoning as needed. Enjoy!

chefs.name: Healthy by ZOE
chefs.summary: ZOE (@ZOE) is a science and nutrition company leading a movement to transform the health of millions through smarter food choices. ZOE means life in Greek — and ZOE passionately believes everyone can feel better and live longer, healthier lives by rethinking what they eat. ZOE conducts the world’s largest nutrition science study to better understand the relationship between food and health. Based on this research, their personalised nutrition program delivers tailored advice based on metabolic and gut health, turning complex science into clear step-by-step actions to improve your health with every meal. Become a member at zoe.com. All of their recipes are developed by nutritionists to help you embrace food that tastes amazing and makes you feel even better.
